response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship values (TDD, CI/CD) and genuine high-scale systems exposure, but the resume shows no evidence of the role's core domain: experimentation platforms, growth engineering, A/B testing, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis. Career progression tops out at Senior/Staff with no demonstrated principal-level, multi-workstream leadership across teams, and the employment timeline contains overlapping and inconsistent dates that would need clarification.
strengths: High-scale distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency async services at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering fundamentals and testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, open-source test tooling author)
Recent AI-tooling experience (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, growth measurement, or telemetry platform experience — the central requirement of the role
No evidence of principal-level scope: cross-team architecture ownership, multi-workstream leadership, or platform adoption by multiple teams
Employment history has overlapping/inconsistent dates (e.g., roles predating graduation, concurrent multi-year positions), raising resume-accuracy questions
